outcome_autofill_reasoning: The call was a productive conversation with Monica Quindley, who is planning her daughter's wedding for 150 guests. The agent (Andre) had a thorough discussion about the venue, food vision, and catering needs. Andre invited Monica to a tasting event on May 3rd at $35/person, sent her the details via email and text, and she confirmed receipt. However, Monica did not explicitly book/confirm attendance — she stated she needs to check with her daughter first about availability before committing to any of the tasting dates (May 3, 17, or 31). She said she would text Andre to let him know. No meeting was formally booked/confirmed. The prospect is clearly interested and qualified (150-person wedding, specific food vision, active search for a caterer, working with a wedding planner), but no next step was locked in with a confirmed date.
